E:\c_c++\bin\cmake.exe -E rm -f CMakeFiles\localtry.dir/objects.a
E:\c_c++\w64devkit\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\localtry.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\localtry.dir\objects1.rsp
E:\c_c++\w64devkit\bin\c++.exe -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\localtry.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o localtry.exe -Wl,--out-implib,liblocaltry.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\localtry.dir\linkLibs.rsp
